title: [codereview-pass3-robustness-5] Minor IETF style: add MUST for FSM implementation and table normative note
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md now has comprehensive coverage of all requested topics (SFN modulo with example+boundary test, multi-root conflict per RPL, full FSM table with timers, RPL version handling in join/drift, explicit time-provider interaction with epoch_floor/wall_clock_valid and init order). Only P3 nit: explicitly mark Table 1 as normative per IETF. No P0-P2 issues. This is review pass 2/3.
